components.name: Alert
components.description: Feedback banner: compact bar (sleek) or titled card (detailed) with optional CTA and close.

props.title: string
props.description: string — alert body copy (Alert prop, not schema metadata)

notes: Use `type=detailed` when you need a title row; `sleek` is a single-line-style bar.
CTA is a nested Button: tune via cta* props.

components.name: Avatar
components.description: Round avatar: photo, initials, brand logo (via Logo), or icon; optional badge and selection ring.
notes: `type=logo` uses the Logo component; supply logoName + logoCategory or logo image fields as needed.

components.name: Badge
components.description: Text label, numeric count, or dot with semantic color context.

props.context: default | default-alt | primary | positive | notice | negative | highlight | live
props.label: string

notes: Leading/trailing icons only apply when `type=text`.
If an icon flag is true but no custom icon is passed, a default star glyph is used.

components.name: BottomSheet
components.description: Modal sheet from the bottom: optional custom header, title/subtitle, two CTAs, dismiss, Escape to close.
notes: When `open`, Escape calls `onClose`.
Includes BottomSheetHeader + HomeIndicator in the layout.

components.name: BottomSheetHeader
components.description: Sheet header: default (handle, title, subtitle, optional Chip tabs, dismiss) or image (240px slot).
notes: Props named `title` / `subtitle` are booleans that toggle rows; copy goes in `titleText` / `subtitleText`.
Tab row uses Chip components when `tabs` is true.

components.name: BrandLogo
components.description: PML mark SVG; pick theme for light vs dark surfaces.
notes: Import `brandLogoThemeForAppColorScheme(appScheme)` to map app `light`/`dark` to `theme`.

components.name: Button
components.description: Button with optional icon placement and built-in loading spinner.
notes: Extends native `<button>` props except `type` — use `htmlType` for submit/reset.
If an icon placement is set but `iconContent` is omitted, defaults to arrow_right_outline.

components.name: Card
components.description: Default surface wrapper; optional outline stroke and optional click behavior.
notes: Prefer `stroke={false}` unless the spec needs an outlined card.
Narrow parents: override `.textfield` width when placing TextField inside (TextField root is 344px in CSS).

components.name: CardControl
components.description: Carousel page dots; 2–8 pages with condensed layouts for 7 and 8.
notes: Same props as PageControl (dots, selection, onChange); default dot sizes differ slightly between the two components.

components.name: Checkbox
components.description: Labeled checkbox; supports indeterminate display via `state`.

props.label: string
props.name: optional — HTML `name` on the underlying input
props.value: optional — HTML `value` on the underlying input

notes: Visual check state comes from `state`; the hidden input `checked` matches checked vs not (indeterminate set on the element ref).
For controlled usage, update `state` in `onChange` from the event.
Other native input attributes (e.g. `id`, `aria-*`) are spread onto the hidden checkbox — see `Checkbox.tsx`.

components.name: Chip
components.description: Pill control for filters/tags; keyboard-activatable when not disabled.
notes: `type=disabled` removes interaction; otherwise role=button, Enter/Space call `onPress`.
Use `size=extra-small` for dense chip rows (e.g. time-range filters).

components.name: Dropdown
components.description: Floating-label single-select; optional helper or error line under the field.

props.label: string
props.options: array of options, each { label, value }

notes: Controlled when `value` is passed; otherwise internal state.
Click outside closes the list.

components.name: HomeIndicator
components.description: Bottom safe-area home bar for phone mockups.
notes: `inverse=true`: dark bar on light chrome; `false`: light bar on dark chrome.

components.name: Icon
components.description: SVG glyph by asset name from `icons/svg/glyphs/` (lazy-loaded).

props.name: glyph id string — valid names from `iconNames` export in this module

notes: Extra props are passed through to the root `<svg>` (SVGAttributes).
Use the `iconNames` export to enumerate valid `name` values.
Unknown names leave nothing rendered after the import resolves.

components.name: ListItem
components.description: Rich list row: avatar, primary/subtext, optional value chip, trailing icon/text/link/button.
notes: Holdings / MTF equity rows use **StocksCard** (not ListItem variants).
Many more optional props exist for avatars, badges, tertiary lines — see ListItem.tsx for full API.

components.name: Loading
components.description: Five-dot progress animation.
notes: Button `loading` uses this pattern internally.

components.name: Logo
components.description: Square brand image from category + name lookup, or explicit `src`.

props.name: logo asset key for the chosen category (when not using `src` alone)

notes: Broken/missing image falls back to initials / placeholder styling.

components.name: OtpTextField
components.description: Fixed-length OTP cells (4 or 6) with optional resend and validation messaging.
notes: Digits only; paste fills sequential cells.
`helper` switches validation styling under the cells.

components.name: OverflowMenu
components.description: Vertical list: optional icon shortcut row, then titled sections of icon+label rows.

props.iconActions: array of top shortcut rows: { icon, label, onClick? }
props.sections: array of groups: { title?, items: { icon, label, onClick? }[] }

notes: Presentational only — wrap in your own popover/anchor for a live menu.

components.name: PageControl
components.description: Horizontal dot pager; same rules as CardControl.
notes: Same props API as CardControl; 7- and 8-page ellipsis-style logic matches CardControl.

components.name: Radio
components.description: Radio circle or tick-circle indicator with label.

props.label: string
props.name: optional — HTML `name` (group radios with the same name)

notes: Extends native input props except `type` and `size` (size is the component prop).

components.name: SegmentedControl
components.description: 2–3 segment toggle; each segment can have icons, badge, and disabled.

props.segments: array of 2–3 segments; each has value, label, optional leadingIcon/trailingIcon flags + icons, optional badge, optional disabled

notes: Default `width` is 344 (phone content width).
Provide 2 or 3 segments (stories follow this range).

components.name: Snackbar
components.description: Toast-style bar with optional icon and optional action button.
notes: `position=fixed` draws a decorative status bar strip above the message.
Styling uses `snackbar-*` CSS variables on a dark surface.

components.name: StatusBar
components.description: Decorative status line (time + signal cluster) for mockups.
notes: `aria-hidden` — not for real system status; used inside Header and similar layouts.

components.name: Switch
components.description: Toggle; underlying input is `type=checkbox` with `role=switch`.

props.name: optional — HTML `name` on the underlying checkbox input
props.value: optional — HTML `value` on the underlying input

notes: Use prop `on`, not `checked`, for the visual on state.

components.name: Tabs
components.description: Underlined tab row; export name is `Tabs` from the `Tab` folder.

props.tabs: array of TabItem: value, label, optional icon/badge flags and content per tab, optional disabled

notes: Also export types `TabItem`, `TabSize` from the same module.
Typical import: `import { Tabs } from '../components/Tab'` (or `components/Tab`).

components.name: TextField
components.description: Single-line field with floating label and optional leading/trailing icons.
notes: Additional native input attributes are spread onto the input (except conflicting `size`).
Root is 344px wide in CSS — scope a width override when the parent is narrower than the phone column.

components.name: Tile
components.description: Large tap target with icon, title, subtitle; optional favourite affordance.
notes: `variant=action` enables favourite control and optional gradient behind the star.
